# Oleg Izosimov — Art Director & Design Group Lead
> Portfolio website of Oleg Izosimov, a senior art director and design group lead specializing in brand systems, rebranding, digital campaigns, and creative direction. Award-winning creative: Cannes Lions Gold, D&AD, Epica, AD Stars, Red Apple, Eurobest.

## About
Oleg Izosimov is a Russian art director and head of design group with 7+ years of experience in brand design, rebranding, and creative direction. He has led major projects for M.Video-Eldorado (Russia's largest electronics retailer), an international fintech company (2021-2023), and FC Zenit (Russian Premier League football club). His work spans brand identity systems, digital campaigns, merchandise design, and integrated marketing campaigns. Oleg is also skilled in vibe-coding websites.

## Awards & Recognition
- D&AD
- Cannes Lions Gold
- AD Stars
- Red Apple
- Epica
- Eurobest
- ADCR jury member
- MAD Stars 2026 judge

## Education & Thought Leadership
- Course author: "Creating an Advertising Campaign: Strategy, Creative, Evaluation" (Netology)
- Podcast host: "Idea Fire" (Идея Огонь) — 7 episodes on advertising and creativity (2019)

## Key Projects
- **M.Video-Eldorado Brandbook (2023-2024)**: First rebrand in 30 years for Russia's largest electronics retailer. Developed a unified visual system for two brands within one ecosystem.
- **M.Video App Icons (2025)**: Updated brand colors and refined logo variant for mobile applications across the M.Video ecosystem.
- **M.Video Skupidon Campaign (2025)**: Digital campaign concept featuring a fictional folklore character, integrating brand identity with cultural storytelling.
- **M.Video POPOLAM Campaign (2025)**: AI-powered federal advertising campaign using neural networks to generate key visuals and creative assets.
- **M.Video Merchandise (2023)**: Branded merchandise collection design, including apparel and accessories for corporate identity.
- **International Fintech Platform (2021-2023)**: Creative direction for a major international fintech company. Managed design across branding, digital campaigns, motion design, social media, and product visuals.
- **FC Zenit — This Is All You (2022)**: Integrated campaign for FC Zenit featuring a stop-motion clip by Karan Singh, composed of 20,000 photographs. Cannes Lions Gold 2017 for a previous BMW collaboration is also in the portfolio.

## Expertise
Brand systems, visual identity, art direction, rebranding, digital campaigns, creative direction, merchandise design, integrated marketing, AI-generated creatives, motion design, vibe-coding websites
